data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of copying a link to share via any channel, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes the generation of a temporary link, it does not explicitly mention the ability to copy this link for sharing. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected behavior is not sufficiently evidenced.
gaps: No evidence of the system providing a mechanism to copy the generated link for sharing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
